name: Checkbox Style Menu

releases.author: ReticentEclectic
releases.description:
# What's new

## New Feature

### Tasks Plugin Compatibility
Added optional integration with the [Tasks plugin](https://github.com/obsidian-tasks-group/obsidian-tasks) to support automatic done dates. #4 

- When enabled, Tasks can add done dates when marking checkboxes complete via the style menu
- Find the setting in **Settings → Checkbox Style Menu → Advanced → Enable Tasks plugin integration**
- Works seamlessly with most checkbox transitions (`[ ]` → `[x]`, `[!]` → `[x]`, `[x]` → `[ ]`, etc.)

**Known limitations:**
- `[-]` → `[x]` won't add done date (not a Tasks workflow)
- `[x]` → `custom style` won't remove done date (not a Tasks workflow)

See the README for full details.

## Improvements

- Refactored plugin compatibility architecture for better maintainability
- Enhanced settings validation to auto-disable incompatible features when dependencies are missing
- Added automatic detection and monitoring of third-party plugin availability

## Documentation

- Added **Third-Party Plugin Compatibility** section to README
- Documented Tasks integration setup and limitations

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ReticentEclectic/checkbox-style-menu/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

releases.author: ReticentEclectic
releases.description:
## What's Fixed
  - Fixed conflict with [Outliner](https://github.com/vslinko/obsidian-outliner) plugin's drag-and-drop when using right-click trigger (#3)
  - Fixed long-press gesture in "both" trigger mode

**Special thanks @LeapSurge for the excellent bug report and suggested fix.**

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ReticentEclectic/checkbox-style-menu/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: ReticentEclectic
releases.description:
## What's New

### New Features #2 
- **Multiple trigger methods**: Choose between long-press, right-click, or both to open the checkbox style menu

### Documentation
- Added community plugin installation instructions
- Updated compatibility information

### Settings
New options available in plugin settings:
- Menu trigger method selection (long-press, right-click, or both)

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ReticentEclectic/checkbox-style-menu/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0

releases.author: ReticentEclectic
releases.description:
Checkbox Style Menu provides an intuitive way to quickly change checkbox styles in Obsidian with a long-press menu.

### Features
- **Quick Style Selection**: Long-press a checkbox to open a style menu
- **22 Checkbox Styles**: Supports all 22 checkbox styles of [Minimal](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-minimal) and [Things](https://github.com/colineckert/obsidian-things)
- **Customizable**: Choose which styles appear in your menu
- **Theme Compatible**: Matches any theme or custom CSS
- **Cross-Platform**: Works seamlessly on desktop and mobile devices
- **Touch-Optimized**: Mobile-friendly with haptic feedback and optimized touch interactions

### Requirements
- Obsidian 1.8.10+
- Compatible theme with checkbox styles (e.g., Minimal, Things)

### Installation
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below
2. Extract to `YourVaultFolder.obsidian/plugins/checkbox-style-menu/`
3. Reload Obsidian and enable in **Settings** → **Community Plugins**
releases.name: 1.0.0 - Initial Release
